Stanleya is a type of flowering plant, specifically a member of the mustard family (Brassicaceae), native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The most common herbal preparations made with Stanleya include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to support joint health, immune function, and antioxidant defenses.
